name: UX Wireframe Generator
description: Produces text-based screen wireframes, component inventory, and navigation maps from the product requirements. Runs in parallel with tech-selector to keep total wall time low.

checks.prompt: Generate text wireframes for every screen in the product requirements. For each screen: (1) Layout description — mobile-first grid, (2) Component list with parent-child hierarchy, (3) User interaction flows and state transitions, (4) Navigation map between screens, (5) Responsive breakpoint plan (mobile/tablet/desktop), (6) Estimated Figma token count (colors, spacing, typography). Assume the approved tech stack will be Next.js with Tailwind.
